question: How many more people felt inspired frequently than depressed frequently?
prediction:
根据图表，感到“Inspired”（受到启发）且“Frequently”（经常）的比例是16%，而感到“Depressed”（抑郁）且“Frequently”（经常）的比例是13%。因此，感到受到启发且经常发生的人比感到抑郁且经常发生的人多16% - 13% = 3个百分点 [E1]。

Final answer: 3
来源：[page=1, chunk=chartqa_000009_p1_chart_region]
